title: Restrict permissions to show/hide columns in Item card text widgets
excerpt:
Hi, 
We´d like to be able to restrict permissions reg. showing/hiding columns in Item card text widgets. Today we use several text widgets and a lot of columns for different sections and input fields of our annual plans.…

posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We´d like to be able to restrict permissions reg. showing/hiding columns in Item card text widgets. Today we use several text widgets and a lot of columns for different sections and input fields of our annual plans. Currently everyone within our organization can change the settings of showing/hiding specific columns per text widget and that causes issues for us as the content in our annual plans can be to totally wrong if someone make changes there without realizing (and we don´t get any notifications about it). Therefore, we´d like an option to restrict these kind of changes only to be available for admins and/or board owners.

Kind regards, Therese

posts.author: MRad (M Rad)
posts.cookedHtml: I have also logged a feature request regarding item card permissions - but instead requesting to restrict who can create and delete widgets on the item card. Restrict permissions for editing/creating item card views and widgets

posts.author: SwenDekker (Swen Dekker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Honestly did not know this was the case until I just read this and tested it.
The fact that anyone can alter the widget like that for everyone and permanently seems more like a bug than an intended feature.
Most of the widgets cannot even be altered (permanently and for everyone) that much by anyone.
